mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tech_article WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM world_news_issue WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_hotspot WHERE status = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(read_count), 0) FROM tech_article WHERE status = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(today_reads), 0) FROM world_news_issue WHERE status = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) FROM ai_hotspot WHERE status = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(comment_count), 0) FROM tech_article WHERE status = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(comment_count), 0) FROM ai_hotspot WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_edit_log WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT id, content_type, content_key, action_type, operator_name, content_title, created_at FROM content_edit_log ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM tech_article WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY published_at DESC, featured DESC, sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM world_news_issue WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY published_at DESC, sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM ai_hotspot WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY published_at DESC, sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tech_article ( article_key, category, title, summary, essence, highlight_list, author_name, author_role, author_initials, author_accent, cover_url, content_html, published_at, read_count, like_count, collect_count, comment_count, read_time, is_vip, is_collected, is_liked, in_history, featured, status, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{articleKey}, #{category}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{essence}, #{highlightList}, #{authorName}, #{authorRole}, #{authorInitials}, #{authorAccent}, #{coverUrl}, #{contentHtml}, #{publishedAt}, #{readCount}, #{likeCount}, #{collectCount}, #{commentCount}, #{readTime}, #{isVip}, #{isCollected}, #{isLiked}, #{inHistory}, #{featured}, #{status}, #{sortOrder} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE category = VALUES(category), title = VALUES(title), summary = VALUES(summary), essence = VALUES(essence), highlight_list = VALUES(highlight_list), author_name = VALUES(author_name), author_role = VALUES(author_role), author_initials = VALUES(author_initials), author_accent = VALUES(author_accent), cover_url = VALUES(cover_url), content_html = VALUES(content_html), published_at = VALUES(published_at), read_count = VALUES(read_count), like_count = VALUES(like_count), collect_count = VALUES(collect_count), comment_count = VALUES(comment_count), read_time = VALUES(read_time), is_vip = VALUES(is_vip), is_collected = VALUES(is_collected), is_liked = VALUES(is_liked), in_history = VALUES(in_history), featured = VALUES(featured), status = VALUES(status), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO world_news_issue ( issue_key, title, issue_label, category, today_reads, recommendation, description, cover_accent, cover_kicker, cover_headline, cover_summary, cover_footer, content_html, published_at, status, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{issueKey}, #{title}, #{issueLabel}, #{category}, #{todayReads}, #{recommendation}, #{description}, #{coverAccent}, #{coverKicker}, #{coverHeadline}, #{coverSummary}, #{coverFooter}, #{contentHtml}, #{publishedAt}, #{status}, #{sortOrder} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), issue_label = VALUES(issue_label), category = VALUES(category), today_reads = VALUES(today_reads), recommendation = VALUES(recommendation), description = VALUES(description), cover_accent = VALUES(cover_accent), cover_kicker = VALUES(cover_kicker), cover_headline = VALUES(cover_headline), cover_summary = VALUES(cover_summary), cover_footer = VALUES(cover_footer), content_html = VALUES(content_html), published_at = VALUES(published_at), status = VALUES(status), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO ai_hotspot ( hotspot_key, track, hotspot_type, title, summary, author_name, published_at, cover_url, content_html, tag_list, view_count, comment_count, like_count, heat, is_recommended, is_today, status, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{hotspotKey}, #{track}, #{hotspotType}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{authorName}, #{publishedAt}, #{coverUrl}, #{contentHtml}, #{tagList}, #{viewCount}, #{commentCount}, #{likeCount}, #{heat}, #{isRecommended}, #{isToday}, #{status}, #{sortOrder} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE track = VALUES(track), hotspot_type = VALUES(hotspot_type), title = VALUES(title), summary = VALUES(summary), author_name = VALUES(author_name), published_at = VALUES(published_at), cover_url = VALUES(cover_url), content_html = VALUES(content_html), tag_list = VALUES(tag_list), view_count = VALUES(view_count), comment_count = VALUES(comment_count), like_count = VALUES(like_count), heat = VALUES(heat), is_recommended = VALUES(is_recommended), is_today = VALUES(is_today), status = VALUES(status), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE tech_article SET status = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE article_key = #{articleKey} AND status = 1
UPDATE world_news_issue SET status = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE issue_key = #{issueKey} AND status = 1
UPDATE ai_hotspot SET status = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE hotspot_key = #{hotspotKey} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_edit_log ( content_type, content_key, action_type, operator_name, content_title ) VALUES ( #{contentType}, #{contentKey}, #{actionType}, #{operatorName}, #{contentTitle} )
